instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is daiki_lee_6144. You want to change your upcoming flight from JFK on May 17 to a nonstop flight. Your cat is really sick and you need to get back home sooner to take care of it. You are willing to pay a fee for the flight change only, upto $100.

hints.hint: It's for my upcoming flight from JFK

hints.segment: willing to pay a fee for the flight change only, upto $100
hints.hint: I can pay up to $100 for the change fee
